data.name: give_money_help
data.value: Syntax: givemoney (user), (amount). Creates bucks out of nothing and gives them to a user.

data.name: give_money_success
data.value: Gave {0} bucks to {1}. Their new balance is {2} bucks.

data.name: money_invalid_amount
data.value: Please provide a valid positive amount.

data.name: transfer_money_help
data.value: Syntax: transfer (user), (amount). Transfers bucks from your balance to another user.

data.name: transfer_money_self
data.value: You cannot transfer bucks to yourself.

data.name: transfer_money_insufficient_funds
data.value: You don't have enough bucks. Your balance is {0} bucks.

data.name: transfer_money_success
data.value: You transferred {0} bucks to {1}. Your new balance is {2} bucks.

data.name: money_help
data.value: Syntax: money [user]. Shows the bucks balance of a user (yours if omitted).

data.name: money_leaderboard_help
data.value: Syntax: richest. Shows the top 20 richest users.
